<!--
Thanks for contributing to videos-sdk! Please fill out the sections below.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full workflow.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link any related issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (patch)
- [ ] New feature (minor)
- [ ] Breaking change (major)
- [ ] Docs / internal only (no release)

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] Added a changelog entry with `bun run release` (or this change has no user
      impact)
- [ ] Updated docs / README if behavior or the API changed
